name: Apple Chip Snacking Cake
recipeIngredient: or Hershey's Mini Chips Semi-Sweet Chocolate
or Whipped Topping and ground cinnamon (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour an 8 or 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs lightly; add oil, apple juice, and vanilla.
4. Stir together flour, granulated sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in another bowl.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until well combined.
6. Add chopped apples, chocolate chips, and nuts; stir until evenly distributed.
7. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow cake to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
10. Sprinkle powdered sugar over top or serve with whipped topping and cinnamon, if desired.
